queryCold.command: /usr/bin/time -l node gitnexus/dist/cli/index.js context DoorObj --repo neonnew-core --file Assets/NEON/Code/Game/Doors/DoorObj.cs --unity-resources auto

queryWarm.command: /usr/bin/time -l node gitnexus/dist/cli/index.js context DoorObj --repo neonnew-core --file Assets/NEON/Code/Game/Doors/DoorObj.cs --unity-resources auto

queryAssetRef.note: Used --uid because name-only AssetRef query is ambiguous (Class + Constructor).

notes: Tier 3 reduced analyze wall time and peak RSS compared with Tier 2 while keeping Unity query gates green.
DoorObj summary-only retrieval now returns compact baseline bindings and relies on lazy hydration for full payload expansion.
AssetRef class still resolves to non-empty bindings under unity-resources=on when queried by explicit UID.
